source_pr.title: planner/core: stabilize the execution order of window functions
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

The execution order of window functions is not stable, which may lead to an unstable result.

### What is changed and how it works?

Sort the window functions by the partition by and order by clauses of specifications, which may also lead to a more efficient execution plan because it will require less `Sort` operators.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: planner/core: stabilize the execution order of window functions | sql: "select sum(a) over (partition by a order by b), sum(b) over (order by a, b, c), sum(c) over(partition by a order by c), sum(d) over() from t", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: planner/core: stabilize the execution order of window functions | sql: "select sum(a) over (partition by a order by b), sum(b) over (order by a, b, c), sum(c) over(partition by a order by c), sum(d) over() from t", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because the planner grouped window functions in a Go map and iterated over it, so the execution order of window functions (and the resulting logical plan string) could vary between runs due to randomized map iteration order. This PR stabilizes plan construction by deterministically sorting window specifications (partition/order clauses) before building window operators.
fix_pattern: Sort window specifications/functions deterministically (avoid Go map iteration order) when building window operators to keep plan output stable.

evidence: evidence: planner/core: stabilize the execution order of window functions | sql: "select sum(a) over (partition by a order by b), sum(b) over (order by a, b, c), sum(c) over(partition by a order by c), sum(d) over() from t", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
